mapper.delete: /* 상품 삭제 */ DELETE p FROM products p WHERE p.prod_cd = #{productCode};
mapper.select: /* 상품 정보 조회 */ SELECT prod_cd , vend_cd , prod_name , prod_untprc , prod_reg_date FROM products WHERE prod_cd = #{productCode};
/* 상품 목록 조회 */ SELECT prod_cd AS productCode , vend_cd AS vendorCode , prod_name AS productName , prod_untprc AS productUnitPrice , prod_reg_date AS productRegDate FROM products;
